creator: till@php.net
text:
This is the latest:
http://github.com/till/webistrano-freebsd/tree/1.1

 * a lot of bundled software is removed and replaced with ports
 * add a dependency on www/rubygem-thin (as a server)
 * includes an RC script
 * more config options (WEBISTRANO_VARDIR, _LOGDIR, _RUNDIR)
 * creates logs/webistrano, run/webistrano
